title: Let's build something phoenix.new with Chris McCord
description: Chris McCord, creator of Elixir's Phoenix framework, discusses his new remote AI runtime for building Phoenix applications. The conversation explores how LLMs enable full-stack app development and includes a live demonstration of building a 'Hot or Not' code rating app.
